reviews.comment:
Baños super limpios y con papel. El Shop medio viejo pero no por eso funcional y organizado. Deberían actualizar mobiliario si, pero salvo eso no afecta.
Los combos super accesibles para comer.

Atrás hay una parrilla que la descubrí al irme, la proxima pararé en ella.

Ah y tiene todo un predio para dejar los autos bajo árboles y mesas para comer al aire libre. Muy lindo

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were spotless and had toilet paper. The shop was a bit dated, but that didn't detract from its functionality and organization. They should definitely update the furniture, but other than that, it's fine.
The combo meals were very affordable.

There's a grill in the back that I discovered on my way out; I'll definitely stop there next time.

Oh, and there's a whole area for parking under the trees and tables for eating outdoors. Very nice.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGbFlsZ3lUSG8yV1daT1pIQjFkMDkwTkMweFVuYxAB

reviews.comment:
Es imposible que uno sepa sin un cartel como es el sistema de atención! Ingresamos y hicimos una cola en la caja donde pase el pedido de lo que íbamos a comer y abonamos. Nos sentamos en el comedor a esperar. Al ver que iban llamando clientes que compraron después que nosotros me acerco a la persona que entregaba los pedidos y le consulto y le muestro el ticket, ofuscada me dice "quien te tomó el pedido? Pasaron primero por el mostrador de la cocina?" Mí respuesta es que hicimos la cola de la caja y que en el mostrador que ella decía no había nadie el tiempo que hicimos la cola (15 minutos aproximadamente). No tienen un sistema claro de ventas, te toman el pedido dos veces y eso uno lo tiene que adivinar ya que no hay ni un solo cartel indicando su sistema de atención tan peculiar.
Si tienen tiempo, 10' más adelante tienen una YPF mucho mejor en todos los sentidos.

(Translated by Google)
It's impossible to know how the service works without a sign! We went in and got in line at the register where I placed our order and paid. We sat down in the dining area to wait. When I saw them calling customers who had ordered after us, I approached the person delivering the orders and asked her, showing her the receipt. Annoyed, she asked, "Who took your order? Did they go to the kitchen counter first?" My response was that we had waited in line at the register and that there was no one at the counter she was referring to while we were in line (about 15 minutes). They don't have a clear sales system; they take your order twice, and you have to guess what's going on since there isn't a single sign explaining their peculiar service system.
If you have time, there's a much better YPF gas station 10 minutes further down the road.

reviewReply.comment: Buenos días , lamentamos lo sucedido. Tu mensaje nos ayuda a mejorar y a continuar trabajando para una mejor atención. Te pedimos disculpas y te invitamos a volver a pasar. Saludos
